description:
As a user
  I want to toggle between graph and list views
  So that I can explore notes in different ways

elements.name: Toggle between graph and list views

steps.name: I am on the main page "/"
there are notes of various types in the database
I should see the 2D force graph by default

name: 2D Graph and List View

description:
As a user
  I want to see the graph appearing gradually with fog
  So that I can start interacting early

elements.name: Overlay disappears early while fog persists

steps.name: I have test notes with connections
I navigate to "/graph/3d/{centerNoteId}"
the loading overlay should be visible
the loading text should contain "universe isn't still created"
the fog density should be at least 0.005
the simulation progresses to at least 10% nodes positioned
the loading overlay should disappear within 2 seconds
the fog density should still be at least 0.001
I should be able to click on the canvas

elements.name: Fog fully clears after simulation stabilizes

steps.name: I have test notes with connections
I navigate to "/graph/3d/{centerNoteId}"
I wait for the simulation to end
the fog density should become less than 0.01 within 1 second
all nodes should be clickable
links should be visible with opacity based on weight

elements.name: Early interaction is not blocked by overlay

steps.name: I have test notes with connections
I navigate to "/graph/3d/{centerNoteId}"
the graph is still loading
I drag the canvas to rotate the view
the camera position should change
the loading overlay should still be visible or fading

name: 3D Graph Progressive Loading

description:
As a user
  I want to interact with the graph nodes and camera
  So that I can explore the knowledge graph intuitively

elements.name: Click on a node opens side panel

steps.name: I am on the 3D graph page for a note with connections
the graph has fully loaded
I click on a visible node
a side panel should open
the panel should display the note title
the panel should contain a link to the note details
I am on the 3D graph page for a note with connections
the graph has fully loaded
the graph is still loading
I drag to rotate the camera
the view should change accordingly
the loading overlay should not block the interaction

elements.name: Camera reset button zooms to fit all nodes

steps.name: I am on the 3D graph page for a note with connections
the graph has fully loaded
I click the "Reset Camera" button
the camera should smoothly animate to show all nodes
the animation should complete within 1 second
I am on the 3D graph page for a note with connections
the graph has fully loaded
I hover over a node
the node should visually highlight
a tooltip should appear with the note title

elements.name: Double-click on node navigates to its local graph

steps.name: I am on the 3D graph page for a note with connections
the graph has fully loaded
I double-click on a node
I should navigate to "/graph/3d/{nodeId}"
the new graph should center on that node

name: 3D Graph Interaction
